ground_truth.title: Lodge 12" Cast Iron Skillet: Preseasoned, Non-Stick, Scratch-Resistant, 12 Inch, Gas & Induction Compatible
ground_truth.main_content:
Sponsored

Skip images

@grillfatherbbq.2020 Often ppl miss the concept of taking your skills to the next level. They stress😧and think they need to work harder but there are hidden gems to assist you🤔

By investing a little bit of your money at an affordable cost, your craft can see an immediate boost by using reputable brands. 

I realized that when I purchased my first Lodge cast irons a few years back. These pots retain heat at it’s highest point well over 400🌡🔥🔥🥵 and distributes evenly!

The searing alone is phenomenal and the flavors are enhanced due to the cast iron alone. 

I love spreading some of my gems & this is one I wanted to share on the page for those interested 💫

▪️6 Qt Dutch oven, cast iron lodgecastiron
